patterns.description: ViewModel with private SetProperty<T> and OnPropertyChanged that implements INotifyPropertyChanged directly
patterns.transformation: Change base from INotifyPropertyChanged to BindableBase. Remove: SetProperty<T> method, OnPropertyChanged method, PropertyChanged event, using System.ComponentModel, using System.Runtime.CompilerServices. Add using example-project.App.Shared if not present.
